title: You can just read 25 books
body: Andreessen Horowitz compiled book recommendations from 14 founders and partners
Reading approximately 25 books can help outsiders compete with established experts

title: Overview: Building Expertise Through Strategic Reading
body: Book recommendations from top tech leaders and founders
Spanning business strategy, history, decision-making, and philosophy
A curated path to competitive knowledge

title: The Contributors
body: Andreessen Horowitz compiled recommendations from 14 founders and partners
Contributors include leaders from Flock Safety, Applied Intuition, Decagon, Databricks, Kalshi, and Abridge

title: Business Strategy Foundations
body: Sam Walton: Made in America explores retail and business building
Good to Great examines what separates exceptional companies from good ones
Who focuses on talent and hiring decisions

title: Historical Leadership Narratives
body: The Wright Brothers chronicles innovation and persistence in aviation history
Napoleon: A Life examines leadership and strategic thinking
Endurance details survival and leadership under extreme conditions

title: Decision-Making Frameworks
body: Decisive provides frameworks for making better choices
Monetizing Innovation focuses on pricing and value capture strategies
These titles address practical business decision-making challenges

title: Philosophy and Meaning
body: Man's Search for Meaning explores purpose and resilience
In Praise of Shadows examines aesthetics and cultural perspective
The Magic Mountain offers philosophical depth and reflection

title: Ali Ghodsi's Top Picks
body: Ali Ghodsi recommended six books including The Effective Executive
Competing Against Luck was also featured in his recommendations
His selections emphasize execution and innovation strategy

title: The Effective Executive
body: Recommended by Ali Ghodsi from Databricks
Focuses on management effectiveness and execution
Part of a broader management and strategy curriculum

title: Competing Against Luck
body: Featured in Ali Ghodsi's six-book recommendation list
Addresses innovation and understanding customer needs
Provides frameworks for competitive strategy

title: The Power of Curated Reading
body: Featured titles span business strategy, historical narratives, decision-making frameworks, and philosophy
The collection represents diverse knowledge domains essential for founders
Approximately 25 books form a comprehensive knowledge foundation

title: The Competitive Advantage
body: Reading approximately 25 books can help outsiders compete with established experts
Strategic reading accelerates knowledge acquisition in key domains
Curated recommendations from successful founders provide a proven path

title: Outlook: Knowledge as Leverage
body: A focused reading curriculum can level the playing field against established experts
The collection from 14 founders and partners represents battle-tested wisdom
Strategic learning through approximately 25 books offers outsiders a competitive edge
